Copilot in Word 關於本手冊About
Microsoft 365 Copilot · Word

Copilot in Word 練習手冊Copilot in Word Handbook

跟著做，套用到你的行銷日常Do it. Then make it yours.

讓 Copilot 陪你在 Word 裡草擬、潤飾、讀懂、就地整編——把時間留給判斷與創意。Let Copilot draft, refine, comprehend and co-edit right inside Word — so your time goes to judgment and creativity.

Copilot in Word 是內建在 Word 裡的 AI 助手，能幫你草擬新內容、改寫與潤飾、快速讀懂長文件，並在文件內就地協作編修。本手冊先帶你認識它的能力，再用一個連貫的行銷情境，讓你照著做、馬上上手。Copilot in Word is the AI assistant built into Word that helps you draft new content, rewrite and refine, quickly understand long documents, and co-edit right inside the file. This handbook first introduces what it can do, then walks you through one connected marketing storyline you can follow hands-on.

🧩 6 大核心能力 core capabilities ⚡ 5 個連貫情境 connected scenarios ✅ 每步附練習檔 a file for every step
📘什麼是 Copilot in Word？What is Copilot in Word? 先認識能力，再進情境Understand it first, then dive in
💡它是什麼What it is

Copilot in Word 把 AI 直接帶進你日常寫作的 Word 畫面與聊天窗格。你只要用自然語言描述想要的結果，它就能幫你跨過空白頁、把粗稿改對語氣、將長文件濃縮成重點，甚至在文件裡就地動手改。而且它能參照你的檔案、郵件與會議，讓內容貼近你公司的實際脈絡。Copilot in Word brings AI right into the Word canvas and chat pane where you already write. Describe the outcome in plain language and it helps you get past the blank page, shift a rough draft to the right tone, distill long documents into key points, and even edit in place. It can also draw on your files, emails and meetings to keep content grounded in your real context.

🚪怎麼開啟How to open it
  1. 在 Word 開啟一份文件。Open a document in Word.
  2. 點右下角的 Copilot 動態按鈕（或功能區的 Copilot）。Click the Copilot dynamic action button in the corner (or Copilot on the ribbon).
  3. Copilot 在聊天窗格開啟，輸入提示、選建議動作，或問文件問題即可。Copilot opens in the chat pane — type a prompt, pick a suggested action, or ask about your file.

ℹ️ 需要符合資格的 Microsoft 365 訂閱或 Microsoft 365 Copilot 授權；部分能力（如就地編修 Edit with Copilot）依授權與版本逐步推出。ℹ️ Requires an eligible Microsoft 365 subscription or a Microsoft 365 Copilot license; some capabilities (e.g. Edit with Copilot) roll out by license and version.

🧰六大核心能力Six core capabilities
✍️
Create 草擬Create 從提示、大綱或引用檔案起草Draft from a prompt, outline or file
🪄
Refine 潤飾Refine 改寫、調整語氣、精簡內容Rewrite, adjust tone, make concise
🔍
Comprehend 讀懂Comprehend 摘要、Chat only 問答、抓重點Summarize, Chat only Q&A, extract
🛠️
Co-edit 就地整編Co-edit Edit with Copilot 文件內編修Edit with Copilot in the document
📊
Grounding 紮根Grounding 以 / 引用檔案／郵件／會議Reference files/emails/meetings with /
🧠
Model SelectorModel Selector 切換推理層級或 OpenAI／ClaudeSwitch reasoning or OpenAI/Claude
🎬本手冊的貫穿情境The storyline in this handbook 同一品牌、文件接力One brand, files passed along

為了讓你把能力真正用起來，本手冊設計了一條連貫的行銷情境：你是台灣戶外生活電商品牌「沐野 MUYE」的行銷經理，正在籌備 2026「秋日露營季」檔期並推新品。從一份市場研究出發，文件在 5 個情境間接力使用——草擬提案、改寫 EDM、讀懂代理商 Brief、就地整編企劃書，最後用多份來源草擬檔期回顧。看完就動手，再把同一套流程換成你自己的工作。To help you actually apply these capabilities, this handbook follows one connected marketing storyline: you are the marketing manager at Taiwanese outdoor-lifestyle e-commerce brand MUYE, preparing the 2026 Autumn Camping Season and launching new products. Starting from one market-research file, documents are passed along across 5 scenarios — draft a proposal, rewrite an EDM, understand an agency brief, reshape a campaign plan in place, and draft a season review from multiple sources. Do it, then make it your own.

1草擬提案Draft proposal市場研究 → 提案research → proposal
2改寫 EDMRewrite EDM粗稿 → 品牌化rough → on-brand
3讀懂 BriefRead brief長文 → 重點long → key points
4整編企劃Reshape plan零亂 → 有結構messy → structured
5檔期回顧Season review多來源 → 報告sources → report
🚀5 個練習情境5 practice scenarios 點卡片開始Pick a card to start
✍️從零到草稿：新品上市提案Zero to Draft: New Product Proposal🪄語氣與精簡：EDM 文案改寫Tone & Concision: Rewrite the EDM🔍十分鐘讀懂長 BriefUnderstand a Long Brief in 10 Minutes🛠️一句話整編活動企劃書Reshape the Campaign Plan in One Prompt📊用多份來源草擬檔期回顧Draft the Season Wrap-up from Many Sources
🧭怎麼使用這本手冊How to use it
  1. 下載練習檔Download the file每情境附現成素材，存到 OneDrive／SharePoint。Each scenario ships ready-made material — save it to OneDrive/SharePoint.
  2. 照著提示詞做Follow the prompts複製提示詞，對照實機截圖在 Word 網頁版操作。Copy the prompts and match the real screenshots in Word for the web.
  3. 換成你的情境Make it yours用「延伸你的工作」套到你的日常。Use "Extend to your work" to apply it to your day-to-day.
準備好了嗎？從左側選一個情境開始 👉 或按右上Ready? Pick a scenario on the left 👉 or hit 進入導覽模式。for guided mode.
✍️
內容產出 · DraftContent · Draft

從零到草稿：新品上市提案Zero to Draft: New Product Proposal

⏱ 約 8 分鐘 · 難度 ★☆☆⏱ ~8 min · Level ★☆☆

面對空白頁最耗時。用 Copilot in Word 的「Draft（草擬）」，並以 / 引用你的市場研究檔，幾秒生出一份有背景、賣點、風險、下一步的新品上市提案草稿，再微調成你的語氣。The blank page is the biggest time sink. Use Draft in Copilot in Word and reference your market research file with / to produce a proposal draft — background, benefits, risks, next steps — in seconds, then tune it to your voice.

會用到的功能Features used草擬 DraftDraft／來源引用/ referenceKeep / RegenerateKeep / Regenerate

🎯情境背景Scenario

你是電商品牌「沐野 MUYE」的行銷經理，正在籌備 2026 秋日露營季，要向主管提出一份新品上市提案。手上只有一份行銷部整理的《市場趨勢與新品研究》。與其從零開始打字，不如讓 Copilot 依這份研究先擬出結構完整的草稿，你再聚焦在判斷與潤飾。You are the marketing manager at DTC e-commerce brand MUYE, preparing the 2026 Autumn Camping Season and pitching a new-product proposal to your lead. All you have is a Marketing-compiled Market Trend & Product Research file. Instead of starting from scratch, let Copilot draft a well-structured proposal grounded in that research, so you can focus on judgment and polish.

📂練習檔案Practice files

  • 📎S1_市場趨勢與新品研究_沐野.docxS1_Market_Trend_and_Product_Research_MUYE.docx市場趨勢、客群洞察、競品分析、新品建議與定價通路（草擬的來源）Market trends, audience insight, competitor analysis, product & pricing recommendations (the draft source)

下載後存到 OneDrive／SharePoint，即可在 Word 網頁版跟著操作。Download and save to OneDrive/SharePoint, then follow along in Word for the web.

🔧逐步操作Step by step

1

開新文件、以 / 引用研究檔並下 Draft 指令New doc, reference the research with / and prompt Draft

先把《市場趨勢與新品研究》上傳到 OneDrive／SharePoint。開一份新的空白 Word，在 Copilot 提示框輸入需求，並輸入 / 後開始打檔名，從清單選取那份研究檔作為來源，再按 Generate。提示越具體（段落、對象、長度），草稿越貼近你要的。First upload the research file to OneDrive/SharePoint. Open a new blank Word doc, type your request in the Copilot prompt box, enter / and start typing the file name to pick that research file as a source, then Generate. The more specific your prompt (sections, audience, length), the closer the draft.

提示詞Prompt
根據 /S1_市場趨勢與新品研究_沐野.docx，幫我草擬一份給行銷主管的「2026 秋日露營季新品上市提案」，包含：市場背景與機會、三款新品與賣點、目標客群、定價與通路策略、檔期營收目標、潛在風險、以及下一步行動。語氣專業、條理清楚，約一頁半。Based on /S1_Market_Trend_and_Product_Research_MUYE.docx, draft a "2026 Autumn Camping Season New Product Launch Proposal" for my marketing lead covering: market background and opportunity, three new products and their selling points, target audience, pricing and channel strategy, season revenue goal, potential risks, and next steps. Professional and well-structured, about 1.5 pages.
2

檢視草稿，Keep it 或現場微調Review the draft, Keep it or refine on the spot

Copilot 產出後，選項列會出現 Keep it（保留）、Regenerate（重新產生）、Discard（捨棄）。你也可以直接在 compose box 追加指令微調，例如「更精簡」「加一段給主管的結論」。記得：Copilot 產的是草稿，數字與主張都要你把關。Once Copilot generates, the options bar shows Keep it, Regenerate and Discard. You can also type a follow-up in the compose box to refine, e.g. "make it more concise" or "add a closing paragraph for my lead". Remember: Copilot produces a draft — verify every number and claim.

提示詞Prompt
把提案再精簡 20%，並在結尾加一段三句話的『給主管的重點摘要』，強調新品營收占當月 35% 的目標。Trim the proposal by 20% and add a three-sentence "summary for my lead" at the end, emphasizing the goal of new products making up 35% of the month's revenue.

💠Word 功能重點Feature note

Draft 小技巧：提示不必完美——先講「你要的結果」，再補長度、格式、語氣、來源。用 / 最多可引用 20 個檔案、郵件或會議來紮根草稿，讓內容貼近你公司的術語與 KPI。Draft tip: prompts need not be perfect — state the outcome first, then add length, format, tone and source. With / you can reference up to 20 files, emails or meetings to ground the draft in your company's terminology and KPIs.

✅產出驗收Verify the result

  • 草稿含背景、三款新品、客群、定價通路、營收目標、風險、下一步七大段。Draft contains background, three products, audience, pricing/channel, revenue goal, risks, next steps.
  • 賣點與定價與研究檔一致（例如組合包 NT$1,880）。Selling points and pricing match the research file (e.g. bundle NT$1,880).
  • 結尾有給主管的三句話摘要。There is a three-sentence summary for the lead at the end.

💡延伸你的工作Extend to your work

  • 把 /研究檔換成你自己的市場報告或客戶簡報，草擬你的提案或企劃。Swap the /research file for your own market report or client deck to draft your proposal.
  • 同時引用兩三份來源（研究＋前一版提案＋會議記錄）讓草稿更完整。Reference two or three sources at once (research + prior proposal + meeting notes) for a fuller draft.
🪄
潤飾 · RefineRefine

語氣與精簡：EDM 文案改寫Tone & Concision: Rewrite the EDM

⏱ 約 6 分鐘 · 難度 ★☆☆⏱ ~6 min · Level ★☆☆

手上一封又長又隨便的 EDM 草稿，寄出去會砸品牌。選取文字，用 Copilot 的 Rewrite（改寫） 一句話把它變得精簡、品牌化、可直接寄給會員。You have a long, casual EDM draft that would hurt the brand if sent. Select the text and use Copilot's Rewrite to make it concise, on-brand and member-ready in one prompt.

會用到的功能Features used改寫 RewriteRewrite調整語氣Adjust tone精簡 ConciseMake concise

🎯情境背景Scenario

檔期預熱要發一封會員 EDM，同事趕出來的草稿口語又冗長，還缺行動呼籲與結尾。你不想重寫，只想快速把它拉到品牌調性、精簡有力、customer-ready。For the season teaser you need to send a member EDM, but a colleague's rushed draft is chatty, bloated and missing a call-to-action and footer. You don't want to rewrite it — you just want it quickly lifted to brand voice: concise, punchy and customer-ready.

📂練習檔案Practice files

  • 📎S2_會員EDM活動信_草稿.docxS2_Member_EDM_Draft.docx一封刻意寫得又長又隨便的 EDM 草稿（改寫的素材）A deliberately long, casual EDM draft (the material to rewrite)

下載後存到 OneDrive／SharePoint，即可在 Word 網頁版跟著操作。Download and save to OneDrive/SharePoint, then follow along in Word for the web.

🔧逐步操作Step by step

1

選取草稿內文，用左側 Copilot 圖示 RewriteSelect the draft body, Rewrite via the left-margin Copilot icon

打開草稿檔，選取要改的整段內文，點文件左邊界的 Copilot 圖示，選 Rewrite，或直接在提示框用自己的話描述要怎麼改。Copilot 會保留粗體、斜體等格式。Open the draft, select the body text to change, click the Copilot icon in the left margin and choose Rewrite — or just describe the change in your own words in the prompt box. Copilot keeps formatting like bold and italics.

提示詞Prompt
把這段 EDM 內文改寫成沐野品牌調性：溫暖有質感、精簡有力，去掉口語贅字，控制在 120 字內，聚焦『秋日露營季新品＋組合包限時優惠』，並在最後加一句明確的行動呼籲。Rewrite this EDM body in MUYE's brand voice: warm and tasteful, concise and punchy, remove filler, keep it under ~120 words, focus on "Autumn Camping Season new products + limited-time bundle offer", and end with a clear call-to-action.
2

追加精修，比較 Keep / Regenerate / DiscardFollow-up polish, compare Keep / Regenerate / Discard

看不夠滿意就再追加一句指令，例如補上主旨行與退訂資訊、或再收斂語氣。滿意後 Keep it 保留；想看別的版本按 Regenerate；不要就 Discard。Not happy yet? Add another instruction — e.g. add a subject line and unsubscribe footer, or tighten the tone further. When satisfied, Keep it; to see another version, Regenerate; or Discard.

提示詞Prompt
在改寫版本上方加一行吸睛但不誇張的 EDM 主旨（20 字內），並在結尾補一行簡短退訂說明。Add an eye-catching but not over-hyped EDM subject line (under ~20 words) above the rewrite, and a short unsubscribe note at the end.

💠Word 功能重點Feature note

Refine 小技巧：選取範圍越明確，改寫越精準。除了 Rewrite 預設動作，你也能用自然語言下「更專業」「更口語」「翻成英文」「縮短一半」等指令，適用於一句、一段到全文。Refine tip: the tighter your selection, the sharper the rewrite. Beyond the Rewrite preset, use plain language like "more professional", "more casual", "translate to English" or "cut in half" — works from a sentence to the whole document.

✅產出驗收Verify the result

  • 改寫後 EDM 內文 ≤ 120 字，語氣品牌化、無口語贅字。Rewritten EDM body <= ~120 words, on-brand, no filler.
  • 有明確行動呼籲（CTA）。Has a clear call-to-action.
  • 有主旨行與退訂資訊。Has a subject line and unsubscribe note.

💡延伸你的工作Extend to your work

  • 把任何粗稿（貼文、公告、回信）選取後改寫成對的語氣與長度。Select any rough copy (post, notice, reply) and rewrite it to the right tone and length.
  • 同一段一次產多個語氣版本（正式／活潑／英文）做 A/B。Generate multiple tone variants of the same passage (formal/playful/English) for A/B testing.
🔍
快速讀懂 · ComprehendComprehend

十分鐘讀懂長 BriefUnderstand a Long Brief in 10 Minutes

⏱ 約 7 分鐘 · 難度 ★☆☆⏱ ~7 min · Level ★☆☆

代理商寄來一份落落長的檔期執行 Brief。用 Copilot 的摘要與 Chat only，不改動原文就抓出重點、待你方決策的事項與行動項目。The agency sent a long campaign brief. Use Copilot's summary and Chat only to pull out key points, decisions you must make, and action items — without changing the document.

會用到的功能Features used摘要 SummarizeSummarizeChat onlyChat only問答 Q&AQ&A

🎯情境背景Scenario

光合行銷代理商送來《秋日露營季檔期執行 Brief》，內容涵蓋目標、時程、預算、待決策、風險與回報，但很長。你要在主管會議前十分鐘抓出：最重要的重點、哪些事等你（沐野）拍板、以及你該追問的風險。Photon agency delivered the Autumn Camping Season brief covering goals, timeline, budget, decisions, risks and reporting — but it's long. Ten minutes before your lead's meeting, you need the key points, the decisions waiting on you (MUYE), and the risks you should probe.

📂練習檔案Practice files

  • 📎S3_代理商檔期執行Brief.docxS3_Agency_Campaign_Brief.docx完整版代理商檔期執行 Brief（要摘要與提問的長文件）The full agency campaign brief (the long doc to summarize and question)

下載後存到 OneDrive／SharePoint，即可在 Word 網頁版跟著操作。Download and save to OneDrive/SharePoint, then follow along in Word for the web.

🔧逐步操作Step by step

1

開文件看頂端自動摘要，或請 Copilot 摘 5 重點Read the top-of-page summary, or ask Copilot for 5 key points

在 OneDrive／SharePoint 開啟這份 Brief，若你的授權支援，文件頂端會出現自動摘要，按 View more 展開。也可以直接打開 Copilot 請它摘要成 5 個重點。Open the brief from OneDrive/SharePoint; if your license supports it, an automatic summary appears at the top — click View more to expand. Or open Copilot and ask it to summarize into 5 key points.

提示詞Prompt
用 5 個重點條列摘要這份檔期 Brief，涵蓋目標、時程、預算配置與 KPI。Summarize this campaign brief into 5 bullet key points covering goals, timeline, budget split and KPIs.
2

切 Chat only 追問決策與風險，不動原文Switch to Chat only to probe decisions and risks, no edits

選 Chat only，Copilot 只在聊天回覆、不改動文件。追問「有哪些待沐野決策的事項？」「有哪些風險與備案？」把回覆整理成你的會議筆記或行動清單。Choose Chat only so Copilot answers in chat without touching the document. Ask "what decisions are waiting on MUYE?" and "what are the risks and contingencies?", then turn the answers into your meeting notes or action list.

提示詞Prompt
只在聊天回答，不要修改文件：這份 Brief 中有哪些『待沐野決策』的事項？各需要在什麼時間前決定？另外列出主要風險與對應備案，並標出我在會議上該追問代理商的三個問題。Answer in chat only, don't edit the document: what decisions in this brief are waiting on MUYE, and by when must each be made? Also list the main risks with their contingencies, and flag three questions I should ask the agency in the meeting.

💠Word 功能重點Feature note

Comprehend 小技巧：自動摘要需文件 ≥ 200 字，且存在 OneDrive／SharePoint 才會在頂端自動顯示。Chat only 適合『我只想問、不要它動我的文件』的情境；要它動手改文件時再切回編輯模式。Comprehend tip: automatic summaries need >= 200 words and a file saved on OneDrive/SharePoint to show at the top. Chat only is ideal when you just want answers without edits; switch back to edit mode when you want changes applied.

✅產出驗收Verify the result

  • 拿到 5 點重點摘要。You have a 5-point summary.
  • 列出待沐野決策事項與各自時限。You have the MUYE decisions with deadlines.
  • 列出風險／備案與三個要追問的問題，且原文未被修改。You have risks/contingencies and three questions; the document was not modified.

💡延伸你的工作Extend to your work

  • 把任何長合約、規格或會議記錄丟給 Copilot，先摘要再 Chat only 追問。Drop any long contract, spec or meeting notes in — summarize first, then probe in Chat only.
  • 請它把摘要整理成待辦清單或 email 給團隊。Ask it to turn the summary into a to-do list or an email to the team.
🛠️
就地協作 · Co-editCo-edit

一句話整編活動企劃書Reshape the Campaign Plan in One Prompt

⏱ 約 9 分鐘 · 難度 ★★☆⏱ ~9 min · Level ★★☆

一份零亂、預算過時、沒結論的活動企劃工作稿。用 Edit with Copilot 讓它在文件裡就地重組段落、更新表格數字、補上結論與下一步——你只要審核。A messy working plan with stale budget numbers and no conclusion. Use Edit with Copilot to reorganize sections in place, update the budget table and add a conclusion and next steps — you just review.

會用到的功能Features usedEdit with CopilotEdit with Copilot就地編修In-place editing預覽核准Preview & approve

🎯情境背景Scenario

你的《秋日露營季活動企劃書》還是工作稿：順序亂、預算是舊估值、也沒寫結論。與其手動搬段落、改表格，不如用 Edit with Copilot 在文件內直接整編，你在旁邊審核每個變更。Your Autumn Camping Season plan is still a working draft: disordered, with old budget estimates and no conclusion. Instead of manually moving sections and editing tables, use Edit with Copilot to reshape it in place while you review each change.

📂練習檔案Practice files

  • 📎S4_秋日露營季活動企劃書.docxS4_Autumn_Camping_Campaign_Plan.docx零亂、待更新、缺結論的活動企劃工作稿（就地整編的對象）A messy, stale, conclusion-less working plan (the target to reshape in place)

下載後存到 OneDrive／SharePoint，即可在 Word 網頁版跟著操作。Download and save to OneDrive/SharePoint, then follow along in Word for the web.

🔧逐步操作Step by step

1

開啟 Edit with Copilot，下整編指令Turn on Edit with Copilot and prompt the reshape

在 Copilot 提示框選 Tools ▸ Edit with Copilot（原 Agent Mode），下一句清楚的整編指令。Edit with Copilot 會用 Word 內建樣式在文件裡直接建立與調整內容。In the Copilot prompt box choose Tools ▸ Edit with Copilot (formerly Agent Mode), then give a clear reshape instruction. Edit with Copilot creates and adjusts content directly in the document using Word's built-in styles.

提示詞Prompt
請重組這份活動企劃書，用清楚的標題分成：一、檔期目標與 KPI；二、主打商品；三、預算配置；四、時程規劃；五、風險與備案；六、結論與下一步。把散落的內容歸位，語句改成專業書面體，並在最後補上『結論與下一步』（含三個可執行行動與負責時程）。Reshape this campaign plan into clear headed sections: 1) Goals & KPIs, 2) Hero products, 3) Budget, 4) Timeline, 5) Risks & contingency, 6) Conclusion & next steps. Move scattered content into place, rewrite in professional prose, and add a "Conclusion & next steps" at the end with three actionable steps and owners/timing.
2

更新預算表數字並預覽核准變更Update the budget table and review/approve the changes

再下一句請它把預算表更新成最新配置。若是共用文件，Edit with Copilot 會先在聊天中預覽建議變更，你確認後才套用，避免誤動到協作者看到的內容。它也會遵守追蹤修訂設定。Prompt it to update the budget table to the latest split. In a shared document, Edit with Copilot first shows a preview of suggested changes in chat; nothing is applied until you approve — so you don't accidentally change what collaborators see. It also respects Track Changes.

提示詞Prompt
把預算表更新為：數位廣告投放 120 萬、KOL／短影音 65 萬、設計與素材 35 萬、快閃店與贈品 30 萬，並在表格下方加一列合計與各項占比。Update the budget table to: digital ads NT$1.2M, KOL/short video NT$650K, design & assets NT$350K, pop-up & gifts NT$300K, and add a total row with each item's percentage below the table.

💠Word 功能重點Feature note

Co-edit 小技巧：Edit with Copilot 會直接改文件，動到重要或共用檔前先留意——隨時可用復原或版本紀錄還原。目前它只能在目前開啟的文件內作業，無法建立新檔、加註解或處理圖片。Co-edit tip: Edit with Copilot changes the document directly — be careful with important or shared files; you can always Undo or use version history. It works only in the currently open document and can't create new files, add comments, or handle images.

✅產出驗收Verify the result

  • 企劃書重整為六個有標題的段落，內容歸位。Plan reorganized into six headed sections with content in place.
  • 預算表更新為最新數字，含合計與占比。Budget table updated to the latest numbers with total and percentages.
  • 文末有『結論與下一步』含三個行動與時程。A "Conclusion & next steps" with three actions and timing is at the end.

💡延伸你的工作Extend to your work

  • 把任何零亂初稿丟給 Edit with Copilot 就地整成有結構的正式文件。Hand any messy first draft to Edit with Copilot to reshape into a structured, formal document in place.
  • 請它依 /最新數據郵件 更新文件中的表格與數字。Ask it to update tables and figures in the doc from your /latest data email.
📊
資料紮根 · GroundingGrounding

用多份來源草擬檔期回顧Draft the Season Wrap-up from Many Sources

⏱ 約 10 分鐘 · 難度 ★★☆⏱ ~10 min · Level ★★☆

檔期結束，要交一份成效回顧。用 / 同時引用銷售數據、活動企劃與 EDM 三份來源，讓 Copilot 草擬有數據佐證的《檔期成效回顧報告》，再用 Model Selector 比較不同模型的輸出。The season ended and a wrap-up is due. Reference three sources at once with / — sales data, the campaign plan and the EDM — to have Copilot draft a data-backed season review, then compare outputs with the Model Selector.

會用到的功能Features used多來源紮根Multi-source grounding／引用/ referenceModel SelectorModel Selector

🎯情境背景Scenario

秋日露營季跑完，主管要一份成效回顧：這檔賣得如何、哪些新品是亮點、哪些沒達標、下一檔怎麼調整。答案分散在銷售數據 Excel、你整編過的活動企劃、以及發出的 EDM。讓 Copilot 一次讀齊、寫成報告。The Autumn Camping Season is over and your lead wants a review: how it sold, which new products were the highlights, what missed targets, and how to adjust next season. The answers are spread across a sales Excel, your reshaped campaign plan, and the EDM you sent. Let Copilot read them all at once and write the report.

📂練習檔案Practice files

  • 📎S5_檔期銷售數據.xlsxS5_Campaign_Sales_Data.xlsx檔期各商品銷量、營收、渠道與檔期摘要（主要數據來源）Per-product units, revenue, channel and a season summary (the primary data source)
  • 📎S4_秋日露營季活動企劃書.docxS4_Autumn_Camping_Campaign_Plan.docx情境 4 整編後的活動企劃（目標與 KPI 對照）The reshaped campaign plan from Scenario 4 (goals & KPIs to compare against)
  • 📎S2_會員EDM活動信_草稿.docxS2_Member_EDM_Draft.docx情境 2 的會員 EDM（溝通內容對照）The member EDM from Scenario 2 (messaging reference)

下載後存到 OneDrive／SharePoint，即可在 Word 網頁版跟著操作。Download and save to OneDrive/SharePoint, then follow along in Word for the web.

🔧逐步操作Step by step

1

新文件中以 / 引用文件來源，並貼上關鍵銷售數字New doc: reference the docs with / and paste the key sales figures

開新的空白 Word，在提示框輸入 / 加入活動企劃與 EDM（Draft 來源支援 Word／PPT／PDF／TXT，最多 20 個；試算表數據直接把關鍵數字貼進提示裡），請 Copilot 草擬一份對照目標的檔期成效回顧。Open a new blank Word doc, type / to add the campaign plan and EDM (Draft supports Word/PPT/PDF/TXT, up to 20; for spreadsheet data just paste the key numbers into the prompt), and ask Copilot to draft a season review measured against the goals.

提示詞Prompt
請根據 /S4_秋日露營季活動企劃書.docx 與 /S2_會員EDM活動信_草稿.docx，並參考以下銷售數據，草擬一份《2026 秋日露營季成效回顧報告》：檔期總營收約 637 萬、新品營收約 559 萬（占 88%）、組合包約 143 萬、氛圍燈約 125 萬、EDM 開信率 29.4%、新增會員 8,640。內容包含：整體成效摘要（對比目標營收 480 萬、新品占比 35%）、商品亮點與未達標、渠道表現、下一檔三點建議，並附成效總表。Using /S4_Autumn_Camping_Campaign_Plan.docx and /S2_Member_EDM_Draft.docx, and referencing this sales data — total revenue ~6.37M, new-product revenue ~5.59M (88%), bundle ~1.43M, lamp ~1.25M, EDM open rate 29.4%, +8,640 members — draft a "2026 Autumn Camping Season Review": overall summary (vs. goals of 4.8M revenue and 35% new-product share), highlights and misses, channel performance, three next-season recommendations, plus a results table.
2

檢視有數據佐證的回顧報告，再用 Model Selector 優化Review the data-backed report, then refine with the Model Selector

Copilot 依三份來源產出一份含成效總表的回顧——直接對比企劃目標與實際成效（總營收 480→637 萬、新品占比 35%→88%），並點出亮點與待補數據。右側聊天可見它引用的來源。想要不同角度，用 Copilot 的 Model Selector 換推理層級或模型（如 OpenAI、Claude）再 Regenerate 比較。From the three sources Copilot produces a review with a results table — comparing plan targets vs. actuals (revenue 480→637萬, new-product share 35%→88%) and flagging highlights and data gaps. The chat pane shows the sources it cited. For a different angle, use the Model Selector to switch reasoning level or model (e.g. OpenAI, Claude) and Regenerate to compare.

提示詞Prompt
用更深入的推理，重寫『下一檔三點建議』，每點都要引用本檔期的數據佐證，並具體到可執行的行動。With deeper reasoning, rewrite the "three recommendations for next season", each backed by this season's data and specific enough to act on.

💠Word 功能重點Feature note

Grounding 小技巧：提供越相關的來源，草稿越貼近你的真實數據、少空話。Copilot 只在 Word 與你的 Microsoft 365 內容中作業，不連外部工具；企業資料受組織界線保護。Grounding tip: the more relevant the sources, the more your draft reflects real data with less fluff. Copilot works within Word and your Microsoft 365 content only — it doesn't connect to external tools, and enterprise data stays within your organization's boundary.

✅產出驗收Verify the result

  • 報告引用實際銷售數字（如總營收、新品占比）並對比目標。The report cites actual sales figures (e.g. total revenue, new-product share) against goals.
  • 點出亮點商品與未達標項目。It names highlight products and the items that missed.
  • 下一檔三點建議具體且有數據佐證。Three next-season recommendations are specific and data-backed.

💡延伸你的工作Extend to your work

  • 每季用同一套來源組合，一鍵產出你的季度回顧或 QBR 初稿。Reuse the same source set each quarter to one-shot your quarterly review or QBR draft.
  • 加入 /會議記錄或 /主管郵件，讓回顧同時回應主管關切點。Add /meeting notes or /your lead's email so the review also addresses their concerns.
簡報模式Presentation mode
